chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 482 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.03.2023 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zeeshan Hyder Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks direction to Election Commission of Pakistan for deployment of Pakistan Rangers in order to maintain the law and order situation at the relevant Polling Station. In response, learned Law Officer appearing for Election Commission of Pakistan and learned Assistant Advocate General state that at least 01 DSP and 02 Police Inspectors along with sufficient police staff shall be deployed at the said Polling Station to ensure the law and order situation on the polling day. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with such proposal does not press this Petition. In view of the above, the instant Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Office is directed to supply copy of this order to learned Additional Advocate General for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
